details: The agent executed all necessary tool calls (get PR details, get check runs, get comments, get review comments), correctly identified the author (joshavant), accurately summarized the PR body, correctly counted CI results (19 success, 4 failure, 7 skipped), named the specific failing checks, and accurately summarized the single Greptile bot comment with its 5/5 confidence score. All data matches the tool outputs with no hallucination.
